jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zebronics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
